feed.title: AO3 - Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne (Filtered)

entry.title: What I Thought I Had Lost
entry.summary:
Author: SunnyxJarrus

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,424Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 337

Summary: Damian wayne was adopted at birth, but then his adoptive parents died and he is sent to live with A foster family which happens to be his biological father :)

entry.title: Batman/Harley Quinn: Death and Friendship.
entry.summary:
Author: Jakebob555

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,230Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 0

Summary: Following the death of Jason Todd Batman finds himself at a crossroads in his life looking back at his time with his now deceased second adopted Son and Robin. A chance encounter with Harley Quinn though on a late night patrol in the Bowery kickstarts a chain of events pushing Bruce Wayne and Harleen Quinzel back towards each other.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

  • Bruce/Harley. [Friendship.]

entry.title: Reflections Don't Lie
entry.summary:
Author: TheCeruleanStar

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 65,330Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 3

Summary: What if the only way to heal the Batfamily is to break them? It was as close to normal as Gotham child tragedies could get. High school should have been normal. Where Jason Todd could mind his own business and be with someone he cared about. Where Jason Todd could feel like just once, maybe, there was stability in Gotham. It shouldn't have been on him to save her. There should have been someone who caught it, not a reckless kid from Crime Alley. There should have been someone to catch it before anything happened. They shouldn't have died. Especially not like that. And they should have stayed dead. Stay at rest. But instead, they came back. Broken. Wrong. Sharpened into something ugly that only grief and rage with nowhere to go can create. When he comes back, the Bats do what they do best: Repress. Move on. Plan contingencies so this never happens again. But you don't learn lessons if you don't have to look yourself in the eye and reckon with the truth. So what happens when another mirror that can't be angled away comes back shattered into something unrecognizable? When all she does is reflect back the consequences of their moral absolutism?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Mr. and Mrs. Wayne
entry.summary:
Author: GothamNocturne

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,184Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 22

Summary: Bruce Wayne finally chooses the life he once believed he couldn't have - a wife, a daughter, and a world he's trying to hold together.But peace in Gotham never comes without a cost.When an old debt pulls Selina into something she can't walk away from, secrets begin to fracture the foundation of both their marriage and the Justice League. As whispers of invasion spread and trust begins to erode, Bruce is forced to make an impossible choice:Stand with the world.Or stand with his family.Because sometimes the greatest threat isn't the one descending from the stars -It's the one everyone believes is already inside your home.And this time, the cowl may not survive the cost.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Coming Home to You
entry.summary:
Author: RandomFan001

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,272Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 194

Summary: Clark had long given up his dream of finding his soulmate. The weird feeling he had when his eyes met Batman’s wasn’t anything but nerves and attraction. Definitely not. But when his instincts start acting up, he starts to suspect it’s something else. Worst of all, so does Batman. Featuring; healthy co-parenting, a healthy amount of pining, and a story about finding love and family

entry.summary:

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,186Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

entry.title: one time, when it all goes wrong
entry.summary:
Author: Zuribat026

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,938Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 19

Summary: Beatrice is trying, all things considered. her family feels like it's breaking apart. Clark won't speak to her right now. and things keep happening around her.she needs to help everyone around her, the same way they need to help her.before they can't anymore.

entry.title: I will find you, whenever you are
entry.summary:
Author: Florchus

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,930Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 147

Summary: One accident scatters the Robins across time. Dick. Jason. Tim. Damian. Alone in unfamiliar eras, they must survive long enough to find each other again. Meanwhile, Bruce is left with silence where his family should be, and the growing fear that time might bring them back as strangers.

entry.title: I survived, but what for?
entry.summary:
Author: ThisIsNotTheWriterYouAreLookingFor

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,640Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: On that faithful day in Ethiopia Batman was not late to save Robin. Little did he guess that this would just be the start of a long journey full of misery and heart ache, that at the end, it all may have been worth it… But not so necessary. a.k.a. Bruce saves Jason, but that forces him to come to the terms of his own demons, in order to help Jason with his. And Jason is recovering from the murder attempt, and has a terrible time in the meanwhile.

entry.title: The Bat’s Tailor
entry.summary:
Author: Batfam_fanatic

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,151Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: Bruce felt like he never had time for love. Between his family, his duty as Batman and keeping up appearances as Bruce Wayne, he didn’t know how to fit it into his schedule.Then he found love in one of the places he despises the most:A gala.When a famous fashion designer by the name of Darius Williams catches his eye, his view on love gets turned upside down.

entry.title: The Little Light in the Dark
entry.summary:
Author: Stsrmoonlit

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 54,247Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 11

Summary: It's a story written about the Batman family and It's about Bruce Wayne adopting a child again with this child being different from the rest of his other adopted children and the entire Wayne family became overprotective of this child and so did their friends but this child has a secret and can she keep it from her new family or will they find out her secret and I've made my own character, hope you like this

entry.summary:
Author: victor_loves_frankenstein

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,494Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 9

entry.title: Lights! Cameras! And ACTION!
entry.summary:
Author: Fishwithabow

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 51,059Chapters: 12/25Kudos: 129

Summary: You are Bruce’s Wayne only BLOOD daughter. He adopted you when you were nine following your mother’s sudden death. Your mother used to be a well known actor and so of course, like mother like daughter, you too wanted to be an actor. Your father and your new siblings for some reason tend to forget about you and end up leaving you in their dust. Will that ever change? Will you become famous before they ever notice you? Or will something happen that will change your whole view of your life?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Another Perspective
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 79,086Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 444

Summary: A clash of opposing plans causes Batman to accidentally be doused with a hybrid of not-quite-Fear Toxin and Ivy's pheromones. In order to cope with the opposing influences, his brain convinces him that the four Rogues who were keyed to them - Scarecrow, Ivy, Harley Quinn, and Riddler - have been deaged into children. Obviously he'll have to bring them home and look after them until an antidote is made. Meanwhile, by order of the Batkids in order to NOT break Batman's mind, said Rogues are forced to play along.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: If You Give A Bat A Phone
entry.summary:
Author: Just_Randomness

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,778Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 15

Summary: Do you want drama? [Cut to an imagine of Dick Grayson texting furiously] Humor? [Cut to an image of Stephanie Brown giggling manically while texting] And people texting when they should probably be doing work? [Cut to images of the Bats texting on patrol] Here you go!Or… A texting fic with everyone’s favorite vigilante family!Or… A few excerpts: “What do you expect from a man who named basically everything (including himself) after an animal he’s terrified of?” “I mean I think I would make a radiant bride but like thats just me” “LIES!! BLATANT LIES! I’M NOT EVEN AT THE MANOR!!” “Wow, took you a very long time to respond, Dickhead. Some could say that you’re… dare I say it… lying!” “Why did I adopt so many kids?” “Master Tim, I believe a colony of rats has taken up residency in your bedroom.”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Tim Drake & Dick Grayson & Jason Todd & Bruce Wayne & Damian Wayne
  • Alfred Pennyworth & Bruce Wayne
  • Cassandra Cain & Bruce Wayne

entry.title: Not-So-Solitary
entry.summary:
Author: girlbrainiac

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,575Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 236

Summary: After a mis-aimed batarang throw, Batman managed to hold onto the Red Hood in the subsequent explosion. Fearing that he could lose his son again, Bruce keeps Jason locked in the Bat Cave. Jason is exactly where he never wanted to be: stuck in a glass case amidst a colony of Bats he swore he wanted nothing to do with ever again. More annoying than that, though, they refuse to leave him alone or stop talking to him. Sheesh. Now he almost wished they'd sent him to Arkham. ...Almost.

  • Major Character Death

entry.title: In Alternate Relation
entry.summary:
Author: Effi_Bee

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,001Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 600

Summary: As he lay on his back in the snow, his soon to be murderer already long gone, he couldn’t help but find this situation ironically funny. How it started this way; a bullet lodging itself into a chest. The start and-however pathetic-end of Spider-Man. He had gone full circle now. Hilarious. or Peter Benjamin Parker dies in his world alone and forgotten, only to appear in a different dimension on a different earth in an unknown city with mysterious heroes. Vigilantes? Or are they just urban legends? He decides to start a new chapter in his-new-life, because isn't that what you do when you are supposed to be dead? You move on. (It doesn't matter that it's not really working. It's the effort that counts.) or Another Peter Parker in Gotham fic, but with a twist (and make it Nightswinger).

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Bat's Electrified Heart
entry.summary:
Author: Bread_and_Bats

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,135Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 58

Summary: Batman was fighting a lighting powered villain with the Batfamily but he took a direct hit. Normally, the insulation of his suit would protect him but it was torn near his chest so the lighting had a direct point of entry into him. Right by his heart no less. He acts fine afterwards, but is he really?
